schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Small Business and Supplier Diversity

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the Disadvantaged Business Enterprise (DBE) certification of businesses that seek to bid on state contracts funded by the US Department of Transportation and other federal sectors,. This series also documents the formerly certified businesses that have outgrown the program or for which their certification has lapsed or been revoked. This series may include, but is not limited to: applications, documents required per the DBE application form, correspondence, and certification notices. 49CFR26

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Small Business and Supplier Diversity

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the certification, or the denial of, and the decertification of businesses as small, women-owned, and minority-owned (SWaM). This series may include, but is not limited to: applications, documents required by the certifying agency, correspondence, and notices.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Small Business and Supplier Diversity

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents SWaM plans and progress reports received from state agencies and institutions. This series may include, but is not limited to, plans and reports. COV 2.2-1610; Executive Order 35 (2019)
